reasoning: This animation sequence simulates the action of holding a steering wheel and driving.  The robot will mimic the motions of a driver gripping and turning the wheel. The sequence emphasizes the hands-on nature of driving. Frame 1 begins with the arms outstretched, palms facing each other, in preparation for gripping an imaginary steering wheel. Frame 2 shows the arms slightly bent, simulating the grip on the wheel.  Frame 3 shows a slight turn of the wheel, with one arm moving more than the other. Frame 4 shows the arms returning to a more neutral position, and the final frame shows the arms relaxed and at rest.  This sequence captures the key moments of driving, avoiding unnecessary intermediate frames.
